title: Sangas
heading: Sat Sangas & Events
description: Sacred gatherings, study circles, and community events — spaces to practice, reflect, and connect with fellow seekers on the path.

events.title: Monthly Sat Sanga
events.date: First Sunday of each month · 10:00 AM
events.description: A monthly community gathering centred on sacred sound, shared reflection, and the living practice of presence. Open to all sincere seekers.

events.title: Palmistry Open Evening
events.description: An informal evening of hand reading demonstrations, Q&A, and the chance to experience Vedic palmistry in a warm community setting.

events.title: Women's Healing Circle
events.date: Last Saturday of each month · 2:00 PM
events.description: A held space for women navigating trauma, transition, and spiritual awakening — weaving clinical depth with sacred feminine wisdom.

events.title: Mridanga Immersion Weekend
events.description: A rare weekend of traditional mridanga instruction and Sanskrit foundations — authentic transmission for sincere students.

ctaSection.heading: Want to hear about future gatherings?
ctaSection.description: Follow us on social media or explore our services to find the right door into the Saragrahi community.
